scripts.build: tsc && cp src/agent/templates/*.md src/agent/templates/*.sh dist/src/agent/templates/ && mkdir -p dist/src/prompts && cp src/prompts/*.md dist/src/prompts/
scripts.start: tsc && cp src/agent/templates/*.md src/agent/templates/*.sh dist/src/agent/templates/ && mkdir -p dist/src/prompts && cp src/prompts/*.md dist/src/prompts/ && node dist/src/start.js
